name: graphql
description: Execute GraphQL queries and mutations with support for variables and custom headers

query.description: The GraphQL query or mutation string

variables.description: Variables to pass to the GraphQL query/mutation

headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the request (e.g., authorization tokens)

operationName.description: Name of the operation to execute (useful when query contains multiple operations)

timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30 seconds

endpoint.description: The GraphQL endpoint URL to introspect

headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the request (e.g., authorization tokens)

action.description: What to fetch: full-schema gets the complete schema, list-operations lists available queries/mutations, get-type gets a specific type definition

typeName.description: The name of the type to fetch (required when action is 'get-type')

useCache.description: Whether to use cached schema if available

cacheTTL.description: Cache time-to-live in milliseconds. Defaults to 5 minutes

action.description: The action to perform with GraphQL
